title: Senior Software Engineer - Housing.com - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Housing.com - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com family as a Senior Software Engineer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
